messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831858177538.title: Brother TN-227 Black High Yield Toner Cartridge, Print Up to 3,000 Pages (TN227BK)

paragraph: Brother Genuine TN-227BK High Yield Black Toner Cartridges deliver consistent, crisp, professional print quality with an up to 3,000- page yield.* Brother Genuine toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to produce superior quality results that withstand the test of time. Use only Brother Genuine toner cartridges for reliable results. Brother offers an environmentally responsible way for customers to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges at end of life.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW
High Yield Black Toner Cartridge
Intelligently engineered as part of a complete printing system to work seamlessly with your Brother printer
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Brother Genuine Toner Cartridge
headliner: Brother TN227BK toner delivers superior laser print quality.
expandedDescr: Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).

00000006831858177521.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.
